item.title: Congress Stock Tracker: Here’s What the Most Active Traders Bought to Start 2026
item.description: Both Republicans and Democrats are again under scrutiny for buying and selling millions in stocks.

item.title: Gold Prices Today: February 13, 2026
item.description: Today’s gold prices see the precious metal move up from yesterday. Here are today’s gold futures prices and a quick snapshot of where gold was yesterd...

item.title: Millions Face a Tax Shock on Social Security Back Pay. Congress Is Racing to Fix It
item.description: Your Social Security back pay could trigger a surprise tax bill unless lawmakers step in first.

item.title: This Simple Spreadsheet Could Change Your Financial Life
item.description: It's a simple way to track your income and expenses.

item.title: I Plan to Claim Social Security at Full Retirement Age Just to Invest the Money. Is This Genius?
item.description: Experts weigh in on how to decide when to claim Social Security benefits and whether it's smart to accelerate that timeline to invest.
